full_text:
Xie Jiong 謝煚
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xie Jiong (謝煚)was born in Kuaiji. Respected for his talents and moral qualities. Xie Jiong was affiliated with the Han Dynasty.
